Package grafioschtrader.gtnet.model.msg

package grafioschtrader.gtnet.model.msg
  • Related Packages
    Package
    Description
    grafioschtrader.gtnet.model
     
  • Classes
    Class
    Description
    ExchangeSyncMsg
    Payload for GTNetExchange sync messages (GT_NET_EXCHANGE_SYNC_SEL_RR_C, GT_NET_EXCHANGE_SYNC_RESPONSE_S).
    ExchangeSyncMsg.ExchangeSyncItem
    Single instrument's exchange configuration for sync.
    HistoryquoteCoverageQueryMsg
    Request payload for querying historical price coverage metadata from GTNet peers.
    HistoryquoteCoverageQueryMsg.InstrumentIdentifier
    Lightweight identifier for an instrument in coverage queries.
    HistoryquoteCoverageResponseMsg
    Response payload for historical price coverage queries from GTNet peers.
    HistoryquoteCoverageResponseMsg.InstrumentCoverageDTO
    Coverage metadata for a single instrument.
    HistoryquoteExchangeMsg
    Payload for historical price exchange messages (GT_NET_HISTORYQUOTE_EXCHANGE_SEL_C, GT_NET_HISTORYQUOTE_PUSH_SEL_C).
    LastpriceExchangeMsg
    Payload for intraday price exchange messages (GT_NET_LASTPRICE_EXCHANGE_SEL_C, GT_NET_LASTPRICE_PUSH_SEL_C).
    SecurityBatchLookupMsg
    Payload for batch security metadata lookup request (GT_NET_SECURITY_BATCH_LOOKUP_SEL_C).
    SecurityBatchLookupResponseMsg
    Payload for batch security metadata lookup response (GT_NET_SECURITY_BATCH_LOOKUP_RESPONSE_S).
    SecurityLookupMsg
    Payload for security metadata lookup request (GT_NET_SECURITY_LOOKUP_SEL_C).
    SecurityLookupResponseMsg
    Payload for security metadata lookup response (GT_NET_SECURITY_LOOKUP_RESPONSE_S).
